search_document:
User Request: Supplier performance.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue by Supplier
Type: chart
Description: Trend of monthly revenue generated by each supplier
Title: Top Suppliers
Type: table
Description: Suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Revenue from Suppliers
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue generated from all suppliers
Title: Supplier Order Volume
Type: chart
Description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
Title: Supplier Performance Metrics
Type: table
Description: Key performance indicators for each supplier

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue by Supplier
sql_queries.description: Trend of monthly revenue generated by each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS Month, s.CompanyName AS Supplier, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID GROUP BY Month, Supplier ORDER BY Month, Supplier

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers
sql_queries.description: Suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS Supplier, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID GROUP BY Supplier ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue from Suppliers
sql_queries.description: Overall revenue generated from all suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Volume
sql_queries.description: Number of orders placed with each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS Supplier, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID GROUP BY Supplier ORDER BY OrderCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Metrics
sql_queries.description: Key performance indicators for each supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName AS Supplier, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.OrderID) AS OrderCount, AVG(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS AverageOrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID GROUP BY Supplier ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC
